top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran make ‘major progress’ in talks aimed at lasting peace deal
top_signals.summary: Plenty of obstacles remain, however, including Israel's war in Lebanon against Hezbollah, an Iran-backed militant group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EasyJet Rejects Castlelake Takeover Bids
top_signals.summary: EasyJet has rejected three separate offers from Castlelake, prompting the investment firm to take its latest proposal that values the budget carrier at about £4.74 billion ($6.3 billion) directly to shareholders. The UK airline said it rejected the proposal as not being in the best interest of shareholders, accusing Castlelake of trying to buy the company "on the cheap." Bloomberg's Benedikt Kammel reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Burnham cemented himself as Labour’s winner
top_signals.summary: A coronation for the PM hopeful looks likely — unless Keir Starmer decides to fight back
